title: dalea citrina
intro: Dalea citrina, also known as yellow prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to the prairies of the United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dalea citrina include its potential to alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and support bone health. The herbal preparations of Dalea citrina typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
